_说明: FiveDesigner 资产导入示例文件
_格式: 可以是单个资产对象，也可以是资产数组
_支持类型: character(角色), scene(场景), prop(道具), storyboard(分镜)

characters.name: 主角-李明
characters.description: 25岁左右的年轻男性，身材中等，短发，眼神坚定
characters.prompt: 25-year-old Asian male, short black hair, determined eyes, wearing casual modern clothing, medium build, neutral expression, white background, high quality, detailed face

characters.name: 反派-王老板
characters.description: 50岁左右的中年男性，身材微胖，西装革履，面带冷笑
characters.prompt: 50-year-old Asian male, slightly overweight, wearing expensive business suit, sneering expression, slicked-back hair, white background, high quality, detailed face

scenes.name: 现代办公室
scenes.description: 宽敞明亮的现代办公室，落地窗外是城市夜景
scenes.prompt: Modern office interior, spacious and bright, floor-to-ceiling windows showing city night view, minimalist design, desk and chairs, soft lighting, high quality, detailed

scenes.name: 雨夜街道
scenes.description: 阴雨连绵的城市街道，霓虹灯倒映在湿漉漉的地面上
scenes.prompt: Rainy city street at night, neon lights reflecting on wet pavement, moody atmosphere, urban setting, cinematic lighting, high quality, detailed

props.name: 神秘信封
props.description: 泛黄的旧信封，封口处有红色蜡封，看起来年代久远
props.prompt: Old yellowed envelope, red wax seal on the flap, vintage appearance, mysterious, white background, high quality, detailed texture

props.name: 古董怀表
props.description: 精致的金色怀表，表盖上有复杂的花纹雕刻
props.prompt: Antique gold pocket watch, intricate floral engraving on the cover, vintage luxury, white background, high quality, detailed metal texture

storyboards.name: 开场-办公室全景
storyboards.description: 广角镜头展示办公室全景，主角李明坐在办公桌前
storyboards.prompt: Wide shot, modern office interior, protagonist sitting at desk working, city night view through window, establishing shot, cinematic composition, high quality
storyboards.videoPrompt: Slow pan from window to protagonist, subtle camera movement, ambient city lights flickering

storyboards.name: 特写-发现信封
storyboards.description: 特写镜头，李明的表情从疑惑到震惊
storyboards.prompt: Close-up shot, protagonist's face, expression changing from confused to shocked, dramatic lighting, emotional moment, high quality, detailed facial expression
storyboards.videoPrompt: Slow push-in on face, subtle zoom, lighting gradually changing
